description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian, depicted with a humanoid form and upright posture. The figure has a defined head, torso, arms, and legs, with proportions consistent with an adult human. The clothing appears to be a single-piece outfit, possibly a coat or jacket, with a clear separation at the legs and arms. The surface is smooth and lacks fine detail, suggesting a stylized or simplified representation. There are no visible accessories or carried items, and the footwear is not distinctly modeled. The overall silhouette is clean and geometric, with sharp edges and minimal surface texture.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian figure with a smooth, simplified form, upright posture, and a single-piece outfit. The model is geometric and lacks fine detail or accessories.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from an upper angle, showing the top of the head and shoulders, with the arms and torso partially visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side of the torso and the separation between the legs, with the arm and part of the back visible.
description_view_2: A darker, close-up view of the torso and upper leg area, with minimal detail visible due to shadow.
description_view_3: A mostly blank view, likely showing the back or a featureless side of the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: long coat or jacket with pants
